title: The Kirby Mod!
description: Its a mod about my (and many others!) favorite pink puffball, Kirby!
body:
**THIS NEEDS GECKOLIB AND MCREATOR LINK!!!**

This is a mod about Kirby, the puffball from planet Popstar, and me adding his foes and friends, alongside me adding my own kirby-like mobs, whether nice or not!

Kirby is a basic mob, and ~~until update V1.5~~ (Not anytime soon, ~~i have big plans for V2 :D~~ ), wont have a sucking ability. Instead, you give him certain items to give him abilities.

Meta Knight is a hardy swordsman, who, if convinced, can accompany you through your journey.

**KNOWN BUGS**

- Magical Alter lagging the game when at less than a block away from the player (will fix soon)
- Combos are super hard to keep, and can be buggy (will fix soon)
- DMK mask and Drill Helmet dont follow perfectly the head of player (dont know how to fix)

**ITEMS!**
- Kirby-like and Meta Knight-like material, used to make powerful armor out of themselves.
- Rubber
- Tree Sap
- Duelist sword
- Galaxia 
   - (Uncraftable)
- Invincibility Lollipop
- Request 
- Undo
- Dreamium, an ore used to make powerful armor and tools!
- Miracle Fruit
- Hypernova Potion stuff
- Watermelon Cake
- Maxim Tomato
- Milk Bottle
- Sleepy Hat
- Mini Kirby

**BLOCKS!**
- Fine fields soil
- Fine fields dirt
- Dreamstone
- Cobbled Dreamstone
- Dreamsand
- Dreamsandstone
- Explosistone (now a craftable thing instead of naturally being found)
- Cobbled Explosistone (now a craftable thing instead of naturally being found)
- Dreamium Block

**STRUCTURES!**
- Sky arena

**ADVANCEMENTS!**
- Kirby Mod
- Poyo
- I am Meta Knight
- Duelist's Sword
- Galaxia Acquired
- Into Dreamland
- Dream
- Cover Me In Dreams
- Fine Fields
- Lollipop Land (Gone)
- Old Odyssey (Gone)
- Wild World (Gone)
- Endless Explosions (Gone)
- Step Taken Into Dreamland (Gone)

**ENCHANTS!**
- Positivity

**BIOMES!**
- Fine Fields
- Lollipop Land (Gone)
- Old Odyssey (Gone)
- Wild World (Gone)
- Endless Explosions (Gone)

**DIMENSIONS!**
- Dreamland

That's it folks! let me know if there are any other bugs and such, dont be shy!
